allowed_initial_slice.description: Docs, inventories, schemas, validation contracts, package metadata, and selected source files after import review.

diagnostic_requirements.hidden_guess_result: required when kernel training mode is enabled; optional otherwise
diagnostic_requirements.math_only_exception: math proof checks may skip guess mode when no non-math action is being validated
diagnostic_requirements.post_choice_reveal: honesty result must remain hidden until after the agent/tool choice is recorded

next_review: map tool registry to kernel API surface
stage validation contracts before runtime source promotion
